briefdescription.para: Operational payload spacecraft.
Rocket body or upper stage.
Orbital debris fragment.
Object type is unknown.
Object type not covered by other values.

memberdef.argsstring: (const CDM::Header &aHeader, const CDM::RelativeMetadata &aRelativeMetadata, const Array< CDM::Metadata > &aMetadataArray, const Array< CDM::Data > aDataArray)
memberdef.name: CDM

briefdescription.para: Construct a CDM from its constituent sections.
Check whether the CDM is defined.
Get the CDM header.
Get the CDM relative metadata.
Get the array of per-object metadata.
Get the array of per-object data.
Get the metadata for a specific object by index.

simplesect.para: The metadata for the object at the given index.

briefdescription.para: Get the data for a specific object by index.

simplesect.para: The data for the object at the given index.

briefdescription.para: Get the CCSDS CDM format version string.
Get the message creation date.

simplesect.para: The message creation date as an Instant.

briefdescription.para: Get the message originator identifier.
Get the optional message recipient identifier.

simplesect.para: The message-for string, or an empty string if not set.

briefdescription.para: Get the unique message identifier.
Get the Time of Closest Approach (TCA).
Get the miss distance at TCA.

simplesect.para: The miss distance as a Length.

briefdescription.para: Get the relative position at TCA, expressed in the RTN frame.
Get the relative velocity at TCA, expressed in the RTN frame.
Get the probability of collision.

simplesect.para: The collision probability as a Real.

briefdescription.para: Get the method used to compute the collision probability.
Get the catalog designator for the object at the given index.

simplesect.para: The object designator as an Integer.

briefdescription.para: Get the name of the object at the given index.
Get the international designator of the object at the given index.
Get the object type of the object at the given index.
Get the ephemeris name for the object at the given index.
Get the covariance method for the object at the given index.
Get the maneuverability status for the object at the given index.
Get the reference frame for the object at the given index.
Get the state of the object at the TCA.

simplesect.para: The state of the object at TCA.

briefdescription.para: Get the covariance matrix for the object at the given index.

simplesect.para: The covariance matrix, typically expressed in the RTN frame.

briefdescription.para: Print the CDM to an output stream.

parameterdescription.para: If true, print a decorator around the output.

briefdescription.para: Stream insertion operator.

simplesect.para: A reference to the output stream.

briefdescription.para: Construct an undefined CDM.
Construct a CDM from a dictionary.

parameterdescription.para: A dictionary containing CDM key-value pairs.

briefdescription.para: Parse a CDM from a string.
Load a CDM from a file.
Convert a string to an ObjectType enum value.

parameterdescription.para: A string representation of the object type.

briefdescription.para: CCSDS Conjunction Data Message (CDM) General content sections:
